recommendations.title: Waking the Dead
recommendations.overview: A congressional candidate questions his sanity after seeing the love of his life, presumed dead, suddenly emerge.

recommendations.title: The Singing Detective
recommendations.overview: Tormented and bedridden by a debilitating disease, a mystery writer relives his detective stories through his imagination and hallucinations.

recommendations.title: Land of Mine

recommendations.title: Stalingrad
recommendations.overview: A German Platoon is explored through the brutal fighting of the Battle of Stalingrad. After half of their number is wiped out and they're placed under the command of a sadistic captain, the platoon lieutenant leads his men to desert. The platoon memb

recommendations.title: 1898: Our Last Men in the Philippines
recommendations.overview: The Philippines, 1898. Fifty Spanish soldiers arrive in the small village of Baler to rebuild an outpost. Although the war against the Filipinos and their American allies is almost lost, as is the Spanish Empire, the garrison will endure a cruel sieg

recommendations.title: Downfall
recommendations.overview: In April of 1945, Germany stands at the brink of defeat with the Russian Army closing in from the east and the Allied Expeditionary Force attacking from the west. In Berlin, capital of the Third Reich, Adolf Hitler proclaims that Germany will still a

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: Onoda: 10,000 Nights in the Jungle

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Grand Illusion
